text:
Okay.

It was an unusually warm fall afternoon, so Harry decided to play outside for a while. He watched ducks glide peacefully across the lake. He liked ducks.

Hours went by.

They were chatting.

"Isn't it nice?" Harry asked.

"Hmm."

A hawk swooped down silently.

Harry's little friend screeched.

That's when everything changed.

One huge claw scooped the hawk. It lifted it high into the sky. And that's when everything went quiet.

For Harry.

An owl swooped.

It caught the hawk. Just flew away.

Harry felt the warmth.

It was okay.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
